about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A blueberry estate in the heart of Prykarpattia
about.description1: With God's help, we learned about a remarkable property of blueberries — they
about.descriptionHighlight: slow the growth of cancer cells
about.description3: On Prykarpattian Land, an estate grew — built on love for the berry and respect for nature. We grow and sell. And for those in need —

varieties.title: Our Varieties
varieties.subtitle: From the first berry of summer to the last warm day

duke.name: Duke
duke.description: Opens the season — and the heart. The sweetest, the most tender, the most anticipated. The first berry people wait for all year.

chandler.name: Chandler
chandler.description: Large, juicy, with a rich, full flavour. The kind that catches the eye and stays in memory.

elliott.name: Elliott
elliott.description: Closes the season with grace. A firm berry with a gentle tartness — perfect for freezing through the long winter.

soil.title: Soil
soil.description: Blueberries love an acidic environment. We prepare the soil so every plant thrives.

planting.title: Planting
planting.description: Every seedling is planted with care. The first years are the most important.

care.title: Watering
care.description: Drip irrigation — the berry gets exactly as much moisture as it needs.

feeding.title: Feeding
feeding.description: Fertilisers, like vitamins, — only what the plant needs to stay healthy.

harvest.title: Harvest
harvest.description: Every berry is picked by hand. That is the only way to tell when it is truly ripe.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Carpathian fields through the eyes of the heart
gallery.invite: You can come and pick berries yourself — a special kind of joy. Or buy them in trays straight from the field. You will be warmly welcomed.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you
contact.inviteStart: You're welcome to come and pick the berries yourself — it's a special kind of joy. Or buy them fresh in trays straight from the field.
